InstructionData.Title: Passive Cooler v1.0
InstructionData.Author: LowrentTrent
InstructionData.Instructions:
# Title alias dTank d0 alias dPAStorage d1 alias dPACoolLoop d2 alias dVPLoopInput d3 alias dVPLoopOutput d4 alias dDS d5
INIT: l r2 dDS Activate s db Setting 0 RESET: s dVPLoopInput On 0 #Stop both pumps s dVPLoopOutput On 0 #Stop both pumps CHECKDS: l r1 dDS Activate bne r1 r2 RUNPROCESS #Branch if change occurs l r3 dPAStorage Pressure l r4 dPACoolLoop Pressure brlt r3 5000 2 #skip one line if a<b s dVPLoopOutput On 0 #stop pump if overpressure brlt r4 5000 2 #skip one line a<b s dVPLoopInput On 0 #stop pump if overpressure brgt r3 100 2 #skip next line if a>b s dVPLoopInput On 0 brgt r4 100 2 #skip next line if a>b s dVPLoopOutput On 0 j CHECKDS #return
RUNPROCESS: s db Setting r1 move r2 r1 #Update "previous" state brne r1 1 2 #skip next line if not daytime s dVPLoopOutput On 1 # daytime brne r1 0 2 #skip next line if not nighttime s dVPLoopInput On 1 # nighttime j CHECKDS
ERROR: s db Setting 999
EOF:
